scenarios.name: Split a 400-line SwiftUI screen with inline actions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment extracts dedicated View types (not computed some View helpers), moves business logic out of body into private methods/services, and follows the documented top-to-bottom ordering; baseline relies on computed view properties and inline closures.

scenarios.name: Refactor optional MVVM view model to MV with Observable
scenarios.rationale: Treatment makes the view model non-optional, uses @State with @Observable, initializes it in init from injected dependencies, and removes bootstrapIfNeeded; baseline keeps optional view model and lifecycle bootstrapping.
